name: @nifrajs/schema
description: Built-in schema builder `t` — TypeBox-backed (free JSON Schema + compiled validators), implements Standard Schema so nifra routes validate it natively.
comment:sideEffects: No module here runs work at import time: the standard string formats install lazily from the validate path (src/adapter.ts → src/formats.ts ensureDefaultFormats), not as a top-level import side effect. The previous `sideEffects: [formats]` array did not survive bundling — Bun.build ignores the field — which is why formats were dropped from prod bundles. `false` is accurate now and lets consumers tree-shake freely.
